tasks.title: Prisma schema: Channel, Community, Group, Poll, UserPrivacySetting, group_chat, group_member
tasks.description:
Create ALL Prisma models for EPIC-005 in prisma/schema.prisma.

Models to create:
- Channel: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- Community: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- Group: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- Poll: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- UserPrivacySetting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- group_chat: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- group_member: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities

Include:
- All model fields with correct Prisma types (@id, @default, @unique, @db.*)
- All relations between models (1:1, 1:N, N:M)
- @@map() table name annotations
- Run: npx prisma generate after schema changes

tasks.title: Feature: groups (24 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'groups' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 24 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/groups — Create group chat
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members — List group members
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members — Add members to group
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members/{memberId} — Remove member from group
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/roles — Update member roles
  GET /api/v1/groups — List groups
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId} — Get group details
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId} — Update group metadata
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId} — Delete a group
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/owner — Transfer group ownership
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/avatar — Upload group avatar
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/settings — Get group settings
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/settings — Update group settings
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/invite-links — Create a group invite link
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/invite-links/{inviteId} — Revoke a group invite link
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members/me — Leave group silently
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events — Create a group event
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events — List group events
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events/{eventId} — Get group event details
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events/{eventId} — Update a group event
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events/{eventId} — Delete a group event
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/events/{eventId}/rsvps — RSVP to a group event
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/settings/invite-policy — Get group invite policy
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/settings/invite-policy — Update group invite policy

tasks.title: Feature: broadcast-channels (9 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'broadcast-channels' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 9 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/broadcast-channels — Create a one-way broadcast channel
  GET /api/v1/broadcast-channels — List broadcast channels
  GET /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId} — Get a broadcast channel
  PUT /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId} — Update a broadcast channel
  DELETE /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId} — Delete a broadcast channel
  POST /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId}/recipients — Add recipients to a broadcast channel
  DELETE /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId}/recipients — Remove recipients from a broadcast channel
  POST /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId}/messages — Send a broadcast message
  GET /api/v1/broadcast-channels/{channelId}/messages — List broadcast messages

tasks.title: Verify EPIC-005: build + typecheck
tasks.description:
Run all verification steps for EPIC-005:
1. npx prisma generate
2. npx tsc --noEmit (must pass with 0 errors)
3. npm run build
4. cd frontend && npx vite build (if frontend exists)
Fix any errors found.

tasks.title: Validate and integrate EPIC-005
tasks.description: Run all EPIC-005 tests, validate build, and verify all 10 user stories are implemented.
